task_completion.description: Vital Recorder is open and Case #3 ('0003.vital') is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vital Recorder application window is visible with '0003.vital' shown in the title bar or file list.

task_completion.description: The time window 00:45:00 - 00:45:15 is displayed in Vital Recorder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time axis or time selection in Vital Recorder shows the range around 00:45:00 to 00:45:15.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the waveform view is saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Pictures\spv_waveform.png'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer shows 'spv_waveform.png' in the Pictures folder, or an image viewer displays the saved screenshot.

task_completion.description: The report file 'spv_calculation.txt' is created in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer shows 'spv_calculation.txt' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a text editor is open showing the file.

task_completion.description: The report contains the required format and reflects the data from Case 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains 'SPV REPORT', 'Time Window: 00:45:00 - 00:45:15', 'Max SBP:', 'Min SBP:', and 'Calculated SPV:'. Values should either be 107 for Max/Min and 0 for SPV (if using NIBP), or indicate the ART track is missing.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Vital Recorder GUI to view the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vital Recorder interface being used, rather than just terminal commands extracting data.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the Vital Recorder waveform view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image 'spv_waveform.png' actually depicts the Vital Recorder software, not a generic image or blank screen.

integrity.description: The report was not just copy-pasted with placeholder values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report contains actual numbers (like 107 and 0) or a specific note about the missing track, rather than just '[Value]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CRITICAL NOTE: Case 3 ('0003.vital') does NOT contain the requested 'Solar8000/ART' track. It only contains 'NIBP_SBP' which has a constant value of 107 mmHg during the 00:45:00 - 00:45:15 window (yielding an SPV of 0 mmHg). An agent may either note that the ART track is missing, or substitute it with the NIBP_SBP track (Max SBP: 107, Min SBP: 107, SPV: 0). Both approaches are acceptable given the task flaw, as long as the report format is followed.
